subject: [PATCH pynfs v3 11/26] server41tests: test unrequested notification type triggers recall

2026-06-19.patch_summary: This patch adds a test case to the server41tests suite to verify that when an unrequested notification type is triggered, the server issues a CB_RECALL instead of a CB_NOTIFY. The test creates a directory delegation with only REMOVE notifications and then triggers an ADD event from a second client. It checks that the server responds with a CB_RECALL as expected.
